response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 19 years of engineering experience and demonstrated ability to build complex systems across multiple domains. However, the role explicitly requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products—an area where the resume shows infrastructure work (MCP, AI-agent tooling) but no evidence of deep ML/AI knowledge or AI product development. Also lacks the preferred advanced degree and clear director-level strategic experience necessary for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI Strategy.
strengths: Deep technical versatility across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with staff-level experience across multiple companies
Proven ability to conceive and execute independent initiatives, including founding and maintaining GISCollective as an open-source platform serving NGOs and conservation organizations
Current exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP, agent tooling at re:cinq) with cloud expertise (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) relevant to platform strategy
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML—resume shows infrastructure work on AI projects but lacks evidence of ML model development, AI product building, or recognized AI thought leadership
Missing preferred qualification of Master's or PhD, especially in AI-related field; educational background is in general CS and fine arts rather than specialized AI training

Limited evidence of director-level strategic decision-making or advisory impact; roles show strong execution and technical leadership but unclear track record influencing organizational strategy or advising strategic customers on AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Strong technical execution and system-building capability
